privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real Avare aviation GPS application (com.ds.avare) inside an Android environment without synthetic seed data. The target inner and outer ring distances of 5 and 10 exactly match the explicit task description instructions. The expected screenshot output path is verified against the export script's capture command. The preferences file path aligns with standard Android default shared preferences for the com.ds.avare package and is queried by the export and verifier scripts.
